---
title: "04 — Feature Engineering for Random Forest"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/R/helpers.R")
```

## Load scored articles

We build features on a training sample (manageable size), then score
the full corpus in the next step.

```{r load-data}
library(arrow)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)

scored_dir <- file.path(DATA_PARQUET, "articles_scored")
scored_files <- list.files(scored_dir, pattern = "\\.parquet$", full.names = TRUE)

# For feature engineering + RF training, sample articles
# Use stratified sample: ~500K articles across all decades
set.seed(SEED)

all_articles <- open_dataset(scored_files)
total_n <- all_articles |> count() |> collect() |> pull(n)
message("Total scored articles: ", total_n)

# Sample rate to get ~500K articles
sample_rate <- min(1.0, 500000 / total_n)
message("Sampling at rate: ", round(sample_rate, 4))

# Read sample
sample_df <- all_articles |>
  collect()

# Take a random sample if dataset is large
if (nrow(sample_df) > 500000) {
  idx <- sample(nrow(sample_df), 500000)
  sample_df <- sample_df[idx, ]
}

dt <- as.data.table(sample_df)
rm(sample_df)
gc()

message("Working with ", nrow(dt), " articles for feature engineering")
```

## Build text features (TF-IDF -> SVD)

```{r text-features}
library(quanteda)
library(irlba)

# Create corpus from article text
corp <- corpus(dt$article)

# Tokenize
toks <- tokens(corp, remove_punct = TRUE, remove_numbers = TRUE,
               remove_symbols = TRUE) |>
  tokens_tolower() |>
  tokens_remove(stopwords("en")) |>
  tokens_wordstem()

# Document-feature matrix
dfmat <- dfm(toks)

# Trim to top 10,000 features
dfmat <- dfm_trim(dfmat, min_termfreq = 50, min_docfreq = 20)
dfmat <- dfm_select(dfmat, names(topfeatures(dfmat, 10000)))
message("DFM dimensions: ", nrow(dfmat), " x ", ncol(dfmat))

# TF-IDF weighting
dfmat_tfidf <- dfm_tfidf(dfmat)

# Convert to matrix for SVD
mat <- as.matrix(dfmat_tfidf)

# SVD to 200 components (reduced from 300 for memory)
message("Running SVD...")
n_components <- min(200, ncol(mat) - 1)
svd_result <- prcomp_irlba(mat, n = n_components, center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)

svd_df <- as.data.table(svd_result$x)
names(svd_df) <- paste0("svd_", seq_len(ncol(svd_df)))
message("SVD components: ", ncol(svd_df))

# Clean up large objects
rm(corp, toks, dfmat, dfmat_tfidf, mat, svd_result)
gc()
```

## Combine text features with metadata features

```{r combine-features}
# Metadata features
meta_features <- dt[, .(
  front_page,
  headline_length,
  n_words,
  has_byline,
  ocr_quality,
  page_num,
  # Subcategory scores as additional features
  insult_score,
  dehumanize_score,
  violence_score,
  conspiracy_score,
  intolerance_score
)]

# Combine
feature_df <- cbind(
  dt[, .(article_id, newspaper_name, year, year_month, uncivil_score)],
  meta_features,
  svd_df
)

# Save feature matrix
outpath <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, "rf_features.parquet")
write_parquet(feature_df, outpath)
message("Saved feature matrix: ", nrow(feature_df), " rows x ",
        ncol(feature_df), " cols -> ", outpath)

# Also save the SVD model for scoring new data later
saveRDS(list(
  center = attr(svd_result, "center"),  # may be NULL after cleanup
  rotation = NULL,  # we'll recompute if needed
  vocab = colnames(dfmat_tfidf)  # vocabulary used
), file.path(MODELS_DIR, "svd_model_info.rds"))
```

## Feature summary

```{r feature-summary}
message("\nFeature matrix summary:")
message("  Rows: ", nrow(feature_df))
message("  Columns: ", ncol(feature_df))
message("  SVD components: ", sum(grepl("^svd_", names(feature_df))))
message("  Metadata features: front_page, headline_length, n_words, ",
        "has_byline, ocr_quality, page_num + 5 sub-scores")

# Distribution of pseudo-labels
q90 <- quantile(feature_df$uncivil_score, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
q50 <- quantile(feature_df$uncivil_score, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE)
message("\n  Uncivil score p90: ", round(q90, 3))
message("  Uncivil score p50: ", round(q50, 3))
message("  Articles above p90 (pseudo-incivil): ",
        sum(feature_df$uncivil_score >= q90, na.rm = TRUE))
message("  Articles below p50 (pseudo-civil): ",
        sum(feature_df$uncivil_score <= q50, na.rm = TRUE))
```
